# Delteris / Elenchon

> Engineering the technology for Europe's future.

Elenchon is an on-premise quality assurance and project-workflow platform for heavy industry (welding, metal fabrication, and general shop-floor work). It automates ISO and ASME IX compliance, captures shop-floor data in seconds, and keeps every byte of manufacturing data on the client's own hardware via Phrakton — Delteris's zero-trust network overlay built on OpenZiti and secured with post-quantum cryptography.

## Core Pillars
- Zero-Friction Work Capture (10-second navigation, universal work templates)
- One Project, Two Live Views (Tree & Flowchart, one-paste BOM import from Tekla/CAD)
- Management & Access Control (global custom roles, one-click document generation)
- Qualifications & Procedures (WPS/PQR/WPQ workflow, 6-month continuity tracking, heat propagation)
- Floor Asset & Consumable Control (maintenance hub, machine certification tracking, batch inventory)
- Bulletproof Data Sovereignty (on-premise appliance, automated local backups, post-quantum-safe encryption)

## Pricing (EUR, per appliance, per month, excl. VAT)
- Standard plan: €880/month, 50 workers included, full platform, on-site installation and training. Lite and Premium tiers coming soon.
- Add-ons: Remote Access Module €200/month (incl. 100 GB), Additional Workers €90/month per block of 10, Remote Bandwidth €30 per 100 GB.
- One-time: On-Site Deployment €850, Floor Training €850, Server Appliance ~€300–400 at cost, On-Site Commute Fee €150/visit.
- No per-audit fees, no lock-in — customers who cancel keep permanent view-only access to historical data for audits.

## Deployment
Three steps: scoping session with the founders, on-site installation of the hardware appliance, then onboarding and go-live. Deployment slots per quarter are limited because every appliance is installed on-site by Delteris engineers.
